basic_details.job_title: NEDFL WAMUL Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Assistant, Executive and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: West Assam Milk Producers' Co-operative Union, North East Dairy & Foods Limited (NEDFL WAMUL)
basic_details.post_name: Deputy/Assistant Manager (Marketing & Sales- Fresh Segment), Deputy/Assistant Manager (Marketing & Sales- Frozen Segment), Executive (Sales-Projects), Assistant (Sales & Distribution- Fresh Segment), Assistant (Sales & Distribution- Frozen Segment), Executive / Jr. Executive (Finance & Accounts)
basic_details.short_information: The West Assam Milk Producers’ Co-operative Union / North East Dairy & Foods Limited (NEDFL WAMUL) Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on the official website. A total of multiple vacancies (post-wise not specified) have been announced under the WAMUL Recruitment 2026.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate, Post-graduate degree/diploma in Marketing, B.Com, M.Com, MBA in Finance, CA-Inter, CMA-Inter
qualification.details: Deputy/Assistant Manager (Marketing & Sales- Fresh Segment): Full time Post-graduate degree/diploma in the field of Marketing or equivalent qualification from recognized Institute/University. 6 years for Deputy Manager / 4 years for Assistant Manager in marketing & sales in Dairy/ FMCG/ FMCD /Retail sector. Minimum 1-year team handling experience. Graduates with 4+ years relevant experience may also apply. Deputy/Assistant Manager (Marketing & Sales- Frozen Segment): Full time Post-graduate degree/diploma in the field of Marketing or equivalent qualification from a recognized Institute/University. 6 years for Deputy Manager / 4 years for Assistant Manager in marketing & sales in Dairy/ FMCG/ FMCD /Retail sector. Preference for 2+ years experience in Frozen business/Ice cream business at Executive Level or higher. Executive (Sales-Projects): Full time Graduate in any discipline from a recognized Institute/University. Preference will be given to MBA, with experience in liasoning with Government department, handling civil engineering projects, event management etc. Minimum 3 years of full time working experience in Administrative works / Civil engineering Projects / Event management. Assistant (Sales & Distribution- Fresh Segment): Full time Graduate in any discipline from a recognized Institute/University. Minimum 1 year of full time working experience in Sales & Distribution in Dairy/ FMCG/FMCD sector. Assistant (Sales & Distribution- Frozen Segment): Full time Graduate in any discipline from a recognized Institute/University. Minimum 1 year of full time working experience in Sales & Distribution in Dairy/ FMCG/FMCD sector. Experience in Frozen business/Icecream business preferred. Executive / Jr. Executive (Finance & Accounts): Full Time B.Com from a recognized Institute/University. Preference will be given to candidates having additional qualifications like M.Com or MBA in Finance, CA-Inter or CMA-Inter along with B.Com. Minimum 2 years of experience in Finance and Accounts in a reputed organization, preferably in Dairy/FMCG Sector.

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

selection_process: Document Verification Written Test Personal Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NEDFL WAMUL Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 28-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NEDFL WAMUL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NEDFL WAMUL Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the NEDFL WAMUL Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download NEDFL WAMUL Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NEDFL WAMUL Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Deputy/Assistant Manager (Marketing & Sales- Fresh Segment): Full time Post-graduate degree/diploma in the field of Marketing or equivalent qualification from recognized Institute/University. 6 years for Deputy Manager / 4 years for Assistant Manager in marketing & sales in Dairy/ FMCG/ FMCD /Retail sector. Minimum 1-year team handling experience. Graduates with 4+ years relevant experience may also apply. Deputy/Assistant Manager (Marketing & Sales- Frozen Segment): Full time Post-graduate degree/diploma in the field of Marketing or equivalent qualification from a recognized Institute/University. 6 years for Deputy Manager / 4 years for Assistant Manager in marketing & sales in Dairy/ FMCG/ FMCD /Retail sector. Preference for 2+ years experience in Frozen business/Ice cream business at Executive Level or higher. Executive (Sales-Projects): Full time Graduate in any discipline from a recognized Institute/University. Preference will be given to MBA, with experience in liasoning with Government department, handling civil engineering projects, event management etc. Minimum 3 years of full time working experience in Administrative works / Civil engineering Projects / Event management. Assistant (Sales & Distribution- Fresh Segment): Full time Graduate in any discipline from a recognized Institute/University. Minimum 1 year of full time working experience in Sales & Distribution in Dairy/ FMCG/FMCD sector. Assistant (Sales & Distribution- Frozen Segment): Full time Graduate in any discipline from a recognized Institute/University. Minimum 1 year of full time working experience in Sales & Distribution in Dairy/ FMCG/FMCD sector. Experience in Frozen business/Icecream business preferred. Executive / Jr. Executive (Finance & Accounts): Full Time B.Com from a recognized Institute/University. Preference will be given to candidates having additional qualifications like M.Com or MBA in Finance, CA-Inter or CMA-Inter along with B.Com. Minimum 2 years of experience in Finance and Accounts in a reputed organization, preferably in Dairy/FMCG Sector.

content_sections.heading: NEDFL WAMUL Application Fee 2026
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: NEDFL WAMUL Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: Document Verification Written Test Personal Interview

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NEDFL WAMUL Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 28-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NEDFL WAMUL to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NEDFL WAMUL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the NEDFL WAMUL Various Posts Recruitment 2026 is 28th July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application mode for NEDFL WAMUL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications for NEDFL WAMUL Recruitment 2026 must be submitted online through the official recruitment portal. Offline applications will not be accepted.

faq.question: Q3. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for the posts?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification is a graduate degree in any discipline. However, specific posts like Deputy/Assistant Manager require a Post-graduate degree/diploma in Marketing.

faq.question: Q4. Are there any vacancies announced for the Finance & Accounts posts?
faq.answer: Yes, there are posts for Executive / Jr. Executive (Finance & Accounts) announced. The specific number of vacancies is not detailed in the provided data.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for NEDFL WAMUL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves Document Verification, a Written Test, and a Personal Interview. Candidates must clear all stages to be considered for the positions.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for NEDFL WAMUL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Based on the provided information, no application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for the positions advertised by NEDFL WAMUL?
faq.answer: The job type for the positions advertised by NEDFL WAMUL is contract-based. Candidates will be appointed on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification PDF for NEDFL WAMUL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website for NEDFL WAMUL recruitment?
faq.answer: The official website for NEDFL WAMUL recruitment is https://recruitment.purabi.coop/jobs. You can visit this site for more information and to apply.

faq.question: Q10. Does NEDFL WAMUL offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Information regarding age relaxation for reserved categories is not explicitly provided in the extracted data. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for details.
